genes.clinical_impact: Codeine, tamoxifen dose adjustment required
genes.default_phenotype: CYP2D6 variant detected — see CPIC codeine/tamoxifen guideline for dose adjustment (CPIC 2019)

genes.clinical_impact: Clopidogrel poor response risk
genes.default_phenotype: Intermediate Metabolizer (*2 carrier)

genes.clinical_impact: Warfarin dose reduction required
genes.default_phenotype: CYP2C9 variant — warfarin dose reduction may be indicated per CPIC

genes.clinical_impact: Abacavir hypersensitivity risk (FDA Black Box Warning)
genes.default_phenotype: HLA-B*5701 carrier — abacavir hypersensitivity risk

genes.clinical_impact: Thiopurine myelosuppression risk
genes.default_phenotype: NUDT15 intermediate metabolizer (p.R139C carrier)

genes.clinical_impact: Tacrolimus dose adjustment — CYP3A5 expressors (common in Koreans) require higher doses
genes.default_phenotype: CYP3A5 expressor (*1 carrier) — higher tacrolimus dose needed

genes.clinical_impact: Irinotecan dose reduction — UGT1A1*6 (East Asian-specific) increases toxicity risk
genes.default_phenotype: UGT1A1 poor metabolizer (*6 carrier) — irinotecan toxicity risk

genes.clinical_impact: Statin-induced myopathy risk — dose adjustment for simvastatin recommended
genes.default_phenotype: SLCO1B1 decreased function (*15 carrier) — statin myopathy risk

genes.clinical_impact: Warfarin dose reduction — most Koreans require significantly lower warfarin doses
genes.default_phenotype: VKORC1 low-dose warfarin phenotype (-1639A carrier)

genes.clinical_impact: Caffeine and clozapine metabolism — decreased CYP1A2 activity in carriers
genes.default_phenotype: CYP1A2 poor metabolizer (*1C carrier)

genes.clinical_impact: Rasburicase contraindicated — hemolytic anemia risk in G6PD-deficient patients
genes.default_phenotype: G6PD deficient — rasburicase contraindicated

genes.clinical_impact: PEG-IFN/ribavirin response prediction — CC genotype (favorable) much more common in Koreans
genes.default_phenotype: IFNL3 favorable responder (CC genotype)

genes.clinical_impact: 5-FU/capecitabine dose adjustment or contraindication
genes.default_phenotype: DPYD decreased function carrier — consider fluoropyrimidine dose reduction per CPIC 2018 (PMID 29152729)

genes.clinical_impact: Azathioprine/mercaptopurine dose reduction required
genes.default_phenotype: TPMT intermediate metabolizer (*2/*3 carrier) — thiopurine dose reduction per CPIC 2019 (PMID 30447069)

genes.clinical_impact: Carbamazepine hypersensitivity risk — HLA-A*31:01 enriched in East Asians
genes.default_phenotype: HLA-A*31:01 carrier — carbamazepine/oxcarbazepine SJS/TEN risk; consider alternative (CPIC 2018, PMID 29392793)

genes.clinical_impact: Efavirenz dose reduction — slow metabolizers at risk of CNS toxicity
genes.default_phenotype: CYP2B6 poor metabolizer (*6) — efavirenz, methadone, bupropion dose consideration (CPIC 2019, PMID 31006110)

genes.clinical_impact: Warfarin dose increase — CYP4F2*3 carriers require higher warfarin doses
genes.default_phenotype: CYP4F2 V433M carrier — warfarin dose adjustment per CPIC 2017 (PMID 28198005)

genes.clinical_impact: Rosuvastatin exposure increase — dose reduction recommended in carriers
genes.default_phenotype: ABCG2 Q141K carrier — rosuvastatin/simvastatin dose reduction per CPIC 2022 (PMID 35152405)

genes.clinical_impact: Isoniazid hepatotoxicity risk — slow acetylators need dose adjustment
genes.default_phenotype: NAT2 slow acetylator — isoniazid hepatotoxicity risk (PharmGKB Level 1B; CPIC guideline pending)

genes.clinical_impact: Malignant hyperthermia susceptibility — avoid volatile anesthetics and succinylcholine
genes.default_phenotype: CACNA1S MH-susceptibility variant — avoid volatile anesthetics and succinylcholine (CPIC 2019, PMID 30499100)

genes.clinical_impact: Ivacaftor eligibility — CFTR modulator therapy indicated for specific mutations
genes.default_phenotype: CFTR variant — CPIC ivacaftor guideline applies to specific responsive alleles; confirm allele-drug match (PMID 24598717)

genes.clinical_impact: Tacrolimus dose reduction — CYP3A4*22 carriers have decreased metabolism
genes.default_phenotype: CYP3A4 *22 carrier — tacrolimus dose reduction consideration

genes.clinical_impact: Aminoglycoside-induced hearing loss — contraindicated in carriers
genes.default_phenotype: MT-RNR1 ototoxicity-associated variant — avoid aminoglycosides if alternatives exist (CPIC 2021, PMID 34032274)

genes.clinical_impact: Malignant hyperthermia susceptibility — avoid volatile anesthetics and succinylcholine
genes.default_phenotype: RYR1 MH-associated variant (if curated pathogenic) — avoid volatile anesthetics and succinylcholine; confirm with MH expert
